title: Zombie Army Trilogy
notes: Game runs fine, but it has a graphical glitch upon startup (in the launch screen). Occasional stuttering.
On first try it had error that 'DirectX11 failed to initialise'. I added 'PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%' to the launch options and it worked without any issue.
title: Zombie Army Trilogy

notes: other than a small graphical glitch with the launcher, you can still click play and the game runs great. no stuttering.

title: Zombie Army Trilogy

notes: Initially got the "DirectX11 failed to initialise" error. I tried to disable Esync and D3d11 in the launch options but they both failed to launch. After forcing it to use Wine D3d11 it launched but the launch window was empty aside from hyperlink options "Play", "Settings" and "Support". After clicking Play, it launched straight away and went through the splash screens without issue. Upon reaching the main screen, the menu options all appear perfectly but the background picture appears to be 3D models without any textures on them, all just shades of white. I played a solo horde mode and, while it appeared to perform very smoothly, it had the same issue as the main screen. Most areas of the map and the characters lacked any textures at all, but some of the areas of the map that were deep in shadow were displaying correctly.
title: Zombie Army Trilogy

notes: Runs perfectly. The launcher looks a bit ugly, but it is usable
title: Zombie Army Trilogy

notes: It won't launch after install. Setting launch options to "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%"  will let you run the game but you'll still have "white" textures.
title: Zombie Army Trilogy

notes: Only the mouse sensytivity is to high, the rest is working fine...
title: Zombie Army Trilogy

notes: Doesn't start, pops an error that DX11 cannot be used. PROTON_USE_WINED3D doesn't help. With PROTON_NO_D3D11, it instead gives the error "This game requires the platform update for Windows Vista (KB971512) to be instaled [...]".
title: Zombie Army Trilogy

notes: 15 min ago I reported it borked (default Proton 3.7-8). Now I switched to Proton 3.16-4 beta, and with PROTON_USE_WINED3D it starts, but like others said: (1) the launcher looks broken (missing background bitmap, fonts, looks like a web page that's missing CSS) but it lets you click Start. And (2): no matter the graphics settings (tried lowest and highest), in-game the problem is always: menu+HUD overlay is perfect, but all models are flat shaded and missing textures. Performance seems to be acceptable otherwise, but of course it's unplayable.
title: Zombie Army Trilogy

notes: Did not run into any of the reported "white textures", but performance is very poor. Getting around 20FPS on any graphics setting.
